channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Bitcoin near $60,000 today vs February: Institutional sentiment has flipped
item.description: Bitcoin’s return to $60,000 is drawing heavy ETF outflows, marking a sharp reversal from February when institutional selling eased into the dip.

item.title: Bitcoin's slide has no single cause. AI, tech IPOs, quantum, Strategy sale all play a role, NYDIG says
item.description: Not one, but several overlapping headwinds are hitting the crypto market at once, weighing on bitcoin's price, the firm's head of research Greg Cipolaro said.

item.title: Wall Street Is Coming for Hyperliquid's Perps Crown, Arthur Hayes Says
item.description: Arthur Hayes warned that Hyperliquid's core value driver—using trading fees to burn tokens—exposes the protocol to market share losses.

item.title: Abra’s Bill Barhydt says Wall Street’s next crypto bet is tokenization
item.description: As Abra prepares for a Nasdaq debut, CEO Bill Barhydt is betting tokenized yield products and onchain lending will drive the next phase of crypto wealth management.

item.title: Bitcoin risks new 'purge' with bear-market losses still $35B below 2022 total
item.description: Bitcoin realized losses remained below the $211 billion tally from 2022, leading to a prediction that the next bear-market bottom was not yet in.

item.title: Our corporate @Strategy is to increase net Bitcoin and Bitcoin per share over time. Rumors otherwise are just rumors. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE5mOE8ySmdiQzNRVVJqMWd6TUVjRlhxWHRWNzhOMWNlR0FHcnhpLVR4RWtrUjdIU0NqbGFtNzl4SHYxY3ctRUJGb2VYdDFDMEU4YTNIWlhHV1hrLXpN?oc=5" target="_blank">Our corporate @Strategy is to increase net…

item.title: Claude Opus 4.8 Review: Better At What’s It Good At, Worse At What It’s Not
item.description: Anthropic's new flagship aced our math problem and shipped a spotless game—then drained our entire token quota in a single prompt. We ran it through six tests, and here's how it did.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation cuts and departures aren't a crisis, Joe Lubin says
item.description: The Consensys leader told CoinDesk the Ethereum Foundation's role should be narrower and more focused on stewarding the network's core technology and values.

item.title: What's the biggest risk / problem for crypto right now? Global equity markets are ~$130 trillion Global fixed income ~$150 trillion Global real estate ~$300 trillion Gold ~$30 trillion Alts ~$30 trillion So +/- $640 trillion And crypto? $2 trillion. Less than Microsoft al - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTFBldXZhc3ZKSFNvcmpvakZlMnkwVkxwVW5jZUtKVi1TLS16ZlRRV2dEeXVyVzdnYlB6NW1ENU5tWExpbi16Z2NtY3hzNlU2M1RzcmVxTEc3UVB1Mkg2LWc?oc=5" target="_blank">What's the biggest risk / problem for c…

item.title: I'm imagining the bears who think that Bitcoin is so weak that if you buy 4% of it and talk a lot, you can destroy the whole network. It's not even a person, but a group. Bought 4%. Like, somehow the key weakness of Bitcoin is that if someone buys 4% of it, everyt - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9ncnl4QUtkNC1rVW5CMEZiaTY0aFA5Y1NPc19oODVFTHljOWRjclZVU2VSYlJ5aXE1aWt4RWFhMXItSW8tSnRCSko3UEtGTEZnMkxwTmwxSktYWXdmSmNQUldZdU5aZHc?oc=5" target="_blank">I'm imagining the bears who…

item.title: AI Is Helping Discover Tech Vulnerabilities—And Zcash Is Just the Latest Example
item.description: Frontier AI models have evolved into bug-finding tools, uncovering vulnerabilities across the tech world—and now in crypto too.

item.title: Bitcoin, ether eye worst weekly rout since FTX collapse as cryptos shed $390 billion
item.description: A week that began with Strategy's bitcoin sale ended with one of the largest crypto market drawdowns in years.

item.title: Claude Code Vulnerability Could Let Attackers Steal Credentials From GitHub, Says Microsoft
item.description: Researchers say prompt injection attacks could manipulate AI coding agents to access sensitive credentials stored in software development pipelines.

item.title: Meta is paying creators in Stablecoins. Spending them is someone else's problem
item.description: Meta’s decision to pay creators in USDC validates stablecoins as a mainstream disbursement tool, Joslyn suggests, but it also exposes the industry’s unresolved problem: moving seamlessly from digital dollars to usable local currency.

item.title: Bitcoin most oversold since 2020 crash: Can BTC rebound to $70K next?
item.description: Bitcoin’s latest oversold RSI mirrors 2020 and February 2026 setups that preceded 50% and 30% rebounds, putting $70K back in focus.

item.title: Bitcoin Has Dumped All of Its Gains Since Trump Was Reelected—And Then Some
item.description: Bitcoin surged in the wake of President Trump's reelection, pushing to new highs deep into 2025. Now it's down more than 50% from that peak.

item.title: America’s largest banks are building a new digital currency network to stop a massive deposit drain
item.description: America’s biggest banks are launching tokenized deposits to compete with stablecoins, opening a new front in the race to become the dominant form of cash on blockchain networks.

item.title: Don’t fall for false narratives - Equity bull market intact - Crypto only way for tokenization - Crypto key in a machine to machine AI world - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE9WNEUzcWdxcG1hX3U1aWM5aGN2YzMtNFFBU05Vand4Xy1fV2t0b195ZGZJaDNFQVY1eHRtX0RrcS1aRGJFVHhsRnhOVWdYZDBudjRVbUlqSERXM3pXeDlv?oc=5" target="_blank">Don’t fall for false narratives - Equi…

item.title: A crypto pioneer who turned a $20 million family stake into a billion-dollar fund doubles down on bitcoin
item.description: Sourcing initial capital from his mother to build a $1 billion crypto empire, DFG CEO James Wo says market metrics do not support Tom Lee’s $250,000 ether prediction.

item.title: Meet the Guys Still Clinging To the Terra Luna That Do Kwon Abandoned
item.description: Terra Luna Classic was left behind after an epic collapse almost four years ago. But there’s a community of believers who haven’t given up.

item.title: All of you in the crypto cheap seats can keep dunking on Zcash for 'crashing' to the price six weeks ago, or you can instead learn something and spend your energy helping get your own crypto house in order for the AI & quantum risks ahead - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9IVkRqLW9Yd3A1aEtFN1hLOWtWYy1IS0x2VERDbTUzVGhrTENjSkZmc3NydnFYbUxkQW10REhWZTdkTS1HbHNpdU43eDJrS2h4Y1l4UXc5bFdSUF9uczZydHNXcw?oc=5" target="_blank">All of you in the crypto cheap s…

item.title: HTX Suspends WLFI and USD1 Trading, Converting All User USD1 to USDT After Freeze HTX representatives stated that the team behind WLFI, the Trump family-backed crypto project, recently froze HTX-related on-chain addresses citing U.K. sanctions scree - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE04NUpRdVo4SnJLQ1RzUnhwM0NDRGliV1ZEQWYzeG5xckFndnlETTRCM29kVEFwZnd6aUJZZzhIaG9vTTk5R19WOUJtS0F3MFptRHdhMF9HaG9PdEpvaVFSTjk3RQ?oc=5" target="_blank">HTX Suspends WLFI and USD1 Tradi…

item.title: Satoshi-era bitcoin at center of $285 billion lawsuit moves after 14 years
item.description: The 1LwWt address received a legal notice from Salomon Brothers via Bitcoin's OP_RETURN field in July 2025 demanding the owner prove ownership by November 5, 2025.

item.title: A massive hiring wave reveals trading firms are no longer viewing Polymarket as a niche betting tool
item.description: While rising volume on Polymarket and Kalshi is attracting quantitative firms to prediction markets, they aren't focusing on event outcomes; rather, they're exploiting market inefficiencies for profit.

item.title: Michael Saylor’s rallying cry: Bitcoin needs four forces to win
item.description: The Strategy executive chairman argued that four distinct camps each play a vital role in bitcoin’s long-term success.

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor says "the AI buildout is absorbing capital." "Bitcoin remains the premier asset long term." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5hMVdteWY5WjlGMWtSZnRmd2Jhd3F3czdPQlhCTExtZm5pcVBZaXZGcVdyVUZxRkNhaTJNR2RoZDVwdVBVeTBmQTdORk8zYlJGN1AzOUY0Q2dXQ3k3QlJKRF9n?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor says "the …

item.title: LATEST: 📈 Benjamin Cowen says Bitcoin will eventually hit $1 million, but not until at least the 2040s, much later than most bulls expect. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFB3aTRuNzI2Qi0wbUtlbUVNd2lWSjZ1R3pCVVNOdzMxOFRsbGhVUVJzcERoRTV3ODdjMGNTWXRxM1BQaUY1ZDcxTVppd0xsZ0lPcGtZa3B3MTJHcFRqa1hCaElqUzA?oc=5" target="_blank">LATEST: 📈 Benjamin Cowen says …

item.title: Are retail traders selling their bitcoin to buy the SpaceX IPO?
item.description: Exchange flows and stablecoin movements through this week's sell-off show no wall of money leaving crypto for cash. Exchanges such as Robinhood and Coinbase will not publicly reporting their figures until July.

item.title: Researcher who found Zcash's bug with AI adds Monero to his audit queue
item.description: Taylor Hornby, who uncovered the Orchard flaw that sent Zcash down 38%, says other privacy coins are on his list too.

item.title: WLD plunges 20% as Hayes dumps token a day after saying he would keep holding it
item.description: The BitMEX co-founder and Maelstrom CIO cited a falling chart of SpaceX stock, which does not begin trading until June 12, as Worldcoin slid about 10%.

item.title: Bitcoin back above $61,000 after rout leads to $1.6 billion liquidations
item.description: Bitcoin fell as low as $59,227 overnight before recovering, steadying after Friday's strong jobs report set off a selloff that sank the Nasdaq 100 about 5% and rattled stocks, bonds and crypto together.

item.title: HUNTER BIDEN SAVING CRYPTO - x.com
item.description: HUNTER BIDEN SAVING CRYPTO

item.title: HUNTER BIDEN SAVING CRYPTO - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFBxeXNiLTlwa2N3US1VQ0VxeHFqbHkyNW9aQk1KQkdWTDVuX252a0thUjR4bHRCSEhKb3g2d3A5Q1JoRF9uWnc4b2s5TFZwX1JCckVXd19yXzJqbWMxaUJXVTRfRnprZw?oc=5" target="_blank">HUNTER BIDEN SAVING CRYPTO</…

item.title: Cardano social activity surges as ADA falls under 20 cents to four-year lows
item.description: Santiment data show active addresses at a four-month high and social dominance near a 2026 peak after Charles Hoskinson warned of a "wave of failures" in the ecosystem.

item.title: People still think (or feel) because Bitcoin is down crypto is down. Derivatives/perps, stablecoins, prediction markets, etc are all up in crypto. Crypto touches every area of finance, and is much broader than Bitcoin now. It will take some time for this to sink in. (An - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE1DOEtUbXRGRnVYd19NOVE3Tm9aOUdaNlo2R1N0Q1RwaHd0Rmt3OXBPcTlZRlRNMXI0TkczT2IzM215anN4VGhITVp3Z1hwVWN5WWNoQ3V1OFBzbU9sUlprY0pYNUtTU1U?oc=5" target="_blank">People still think (or feel…

item.title: ETH falls to 13-month low on Zcash bug news and Bitcoin drop to sub-$60K: Is $1.4K next?
item.description: ETH price crashed below $1,600 as a vulnerability in Zcash emerged and Bitcoin sold off below $60,000 for the first time in months.

item.title: Travala lets AI agents book hotels with USDC on Base
item.description: Travala’s new protocol lets AI agents search and book hotels with USDC on Base, but travelers still approve the final payment.

item.title: Crypto tax proposals weighed ahead of Tuesday House hearing
item.description: Among the issues US lawmakers are expected to discuss in a digital asset taxation hearing are “de minimis” reporting exceptions for crypto transactions.

item.title: Zcash Bug Crisis Shows Privacy Cuts Both Ways, Experts Say
item.description: Fallout from a bug that enabled undetectable Zcash counterfeiting shows that privacy can sometimes present tradeoffs, experts say.

item.title: Strategy Shares Fall to 4-Month Low as STRC Dips and Bitcoin Sinks Under $60K
item.description: Strategy shares tumbled alongside Bitcoin on Friday as the firm's flagship preferred stock also came under pressure.

item.title: Adding even more fuel to the fire is the drawdown in crypto, with Bitcoin now down -53% since October. In fact, Bitcoin is down 20% this week ALONE, with crypto erasing ~$2.5 trillion since October 2025. The bear market gained momentum this week and crus - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE9IOWxSa1BEaXdpaEFlcHB2Z0NzaGw4WVFIbXpYS2ZBNlp3Z1BSY01ZT1pHdEFvek5MeG5DQnFUcGk5N2o5MWYxUjBHUEtNUWtBSFVVbXRZcl9Ea3o1M0tNcFJyeUhVQQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Adding even more fuel to the…

item.title: Bitcoin bears face $2.6B trap as BTC funding rate drops: Is a short squeeze brewing?
item.description: Bitcoin bears piled into short positions as BTC price slid to $60,000. Will the $2.6 billion in short leverage lead to an upside squeeze?

item.title: Why diehard bitcoin purists aren’t sweating the massive price crash that wiped out $200 billion
item.description: Mati Greenspan, Michael Saylor and Jameson Lopp blamed the AI boom for draining capital from bitcoin. Meanwhile, Jack Mallers refrained from sharing an outlook but recommended buying the dip.

item.title: Anthropic Is Helping the NSA Hack China. It Also Wants Everyone to Pause AI
item.description: The company behind Claude embedded engineers at the NSA for offensive cyber ops, then published a report warning AI could soon build itself without humans in the loop.

item.title: Zcash Crash Just Wiped Billions From the Privacy Coin's Market Cap—Can ZEC Recover?
item.description: The price of Zcash cratered following the disclosure of a serious vulnerability for the privacy coin. Can ZEC make a comeback anytime soon?

item.title: Kraken offers SpaceX IPO access through xStocks
item.description: Eligible users in more than 110 markets can register for tokenized SpaceX equity ahead of the company's highly anticipated public listing.

item.title: Congress Gets 7 New Crypto Tax Bills: Here's What's In Them
item.description: The crypto tax bills—the first of their kind to be deliberated by congressional leadership—will be discussed at a House hearing on Tuesday.

item.title: Crypto tax in Illinois FY2027 budget is one step away from becoming law
item.description: The law, part of a budget plan passed by Illinois lawmakers, would put the burden of collecting a 0.2% tax on crypto transactions on a registered broker.

item.title: AI exposed a massive flaw in top crypto network and experts warn banks could be next
item.description: After an AI model helped uncover a four-year-old flaw in Zcash, security researchers warn that similar bugs may be hiding across crypto and traditional financial systems.

item.title: Tom Lee's Ethereum Treasury BitMine Prices Preferred Shares With 9.5% Dividend
item.description: BitMine is borrowing from Strategy’s Bitcoin playbook, debuting its own preferred share in an upsized offering to raise funds to buy Ethereum.

item.title: Crypto Biz: Nobody told Saylor ‘never sell’
item.description: Strategy’s Bitcoin sale challenged the “never sell” narrative, while JPMorgan attacked CLARITY and Capital B pursued a huge fundraising plan for BTC.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: BREAKING: Bitcoin is now expected to fall below $50,000 this year. There is now a record high 65% chance of Bitcoin falling below $50,000 in 2026. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFBwWDBwUHhvYjNXQkQwakhTRm4xOGd0WDRXMGlLa0RubEwzSFVCUzFDMG8zTjhnelNnMlowRm1iNW9tN3hsNzdoYVZhR0JYaHJQc0xkdVFZbkl0OUlSSzlyM0g0QXltdw?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Bitcoin is now exp…

item.title: BlackRock-backed tokenization firm Securitize clears key hurdle to go public on NYSE
item.description: The tokenization specialist behind BlackRock's BUIDL fund could begin trading on the NYSE as SEC approves merger registration.

item.title: Pump.fun bounty platform pays users to tattoo tokens and chase viral stunts
item.description: Pump.fun launched a new bounty platform where users started funding bizarre memecoin marketing stunts, including forehead tattoos, skydiving as a mascot and setting a vehicle on fire.

item.title: Bitcoin Dives Below $60K Following Strong Jobs Data, Zcash Crash Shaking Crypto Confidence
item.description: Bitcoin has now fallen more than 50% from its October peak, dipping below $60,000 as the crypto industry reckons with the Zcash vulnerability.

item.title: What Is Strategy (MSTR)? The Bitcoin Treasury Company
item.description: Software firm Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) and its co-founder Michael Saylor have become synonymous with Bitcoin. Here’s what you need to know.

item.title: BREAKING: Bitcoin officially falls below $60,000 as selling pressure accelerates. Total levered crypto liquidations are now up to $1.5 billion over the last 24 hours. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFB0R1k3ZkhEcEQ0MnhnOUFDY3J5VW8wTTFNMnNjaV9nVkVGMzc2TGdWUkV0VnJXOFVzOGo0TjJ5TEZ4Vy04MGp0MEpjdXhmVm5VRzFKNWVjQVFiTkZGSGhneGRaTWVXdw?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Bitcoin officially…

item.title: Saylor says Bitcoin needs ‘disciplined expansion’ as analysts weigh demand reset
item.description: Michael Saylor’s essay calls for Bitcoin to expand through banks, credit, securities and higher layers while preserving its base layer.

item.title: Memecoins dogecoin, shiba inu dive 9% as bitcoin nears $60,000
item.description: Dogecoin and Shiba Inu led losses among major tokens as heavy volume and liquidations overwhelmed support levels, extending a broader risk-off move across crypto markets.
